description: PayPal REST API integration for creating, authorizing, capturing, and managing payment orders.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create a new PayPal order for payment processing with specified amount and currency.

amount.description: The total payment amount as a decimal string (e.g., '100.00').

currency_code.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the payment (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

intent.description: The payment intent: 'CAPTURE' for immediate payment capture or 'AUTHORIZE' for delayed capture requiring explicit authorization.

description.description: A human-readable description of the order for reference purposes.

items.description: Line items included in the order, each containing name, quantity, and unit_amount properties.

id.description: The unique PayPal order identifier used to reference this order in subsequent operations.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'CREATED', 'APPROVED', 'COMPLETED').

intent.description: The payment intent: 'CAPTURE' for immediate payment capture or 'AUTHORIZE' for delayed capture requiring explicit authorization.

amount.description: The total payment amount as a decimal string.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the payment.

links.description: HATEOAS links for order-related actions such as approval and capture URLs.

tools.name: capture_order
tools.description: Capture payment for an order to complete the transaction and transfer funds.

order_id.description: The unique PayPal order identifier used to reference this order in subsequent operations.

id.description: The unique PayPal order identifier used to reference this order in subsequent operations.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'CREATED', 'APPROVED', 'COMPLETED').

capture_id.description: The unique identifier for the payment capture transaction.

amount.description: The total payment amount as a decimal string.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the payment.

payer.description: Information about the payer including email, name, and PayPal account details.

tools.name: authorize_order
tools.description: Authorize payment for an order without capturing funds, allowing for delayed capture.

order_id.description: The unique PayPal order identifier used to reference this order in subsequent operations.

id.description: The unique PayPal order identifier used to reference this order in subsequent operations.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'CREATED', 'APPROVED', 'COMPLETED').

authorization_id.description: The unique identifier for the payment authorization that can be used to capture funds later.

amount.description: The total payment amount as a decimal string.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the payment.

expiration_time.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the authorization expires and can no longer be captured.

tools.name: capture_authorized_payment
tools.description: Capture funds from a previously authorized payment, either partially or in full.

authorization_id.description: The unique identifier for the payment authorization that can be used to capture funds later.

amount.description: The amount to capture as a decimal string; if omitted, captures the full authorized amount.

final_capture.description: Indicates whether this is the final capture for the authorization; if true, any remaining authorized amount is released.

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment capture transaction.

status.description: The current status of the capture (e.g., 'PENDING', 'COMPLETED', 'DECLINED').

amount.description: The total payment amount as a decimal string.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the payment.

final_capture.description: Indicates whether this is the final capture for the authorization; if true, any remaining authorized amount is released.

tools.name: get_order_details
tools.description: Retrieve complete details of an existing PayPal order including status, payer information, and purchase units.

order_id.description: The unique PayPal order identifier used to reference this order in subsequent operations.

id.description: The unique PayPal order identifier used to reference this order in subsequent operations.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'CREATED', 'APPROVED', 'COMPLETED').

intent.description: The payment intent: 'CAPTURE' for immediate payment capture or 'AUTHORIZE' for delayed capture requiring explicit authorization.

purchase_units.description: The items or services being purchased, including amounts, descriptions, and shipping details.

payer.description: Information about the payer including email, name, and PayPal account details.

create_time.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created.

update_time.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was last updated.
